1.description: get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and number

2.description: get quick-clay hazard areas (utlosningomr and utlopomr) within Lillestrøm extent

4.description: get 1km grid cells within Lillestrøm extent

5.description: find parcels intersecting quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: assign quick-clay parcels to 1km grid cells

7.description: count distinct parcels per grid cell
